title: AG says auditor can hire attorney to force audit of Legislature after SJC order
author: Molly Farrar
bullets: AG Andrea Campbell approves Auditor DiZoglio's request to hire an attorney for legislative audit per SJC guidance.
Supreme Judicial Court set a 30-day deadline for AG to decide on Auditor DiZoglio's representation request.
Auditor DiZoglio narrows audit focus to four Senate financial areas, as outlined in SJC order.

title: Kyle Schwarber reveals tepid pursuit from Red Sox this past offseason
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Kyle Schwarber criticized the Red Sox's lackluster contract talks before he re-signed with the Phillies for $150 million.
Schwarber, with the Phillies, has hit 204 home runs over five seasons, highlighting his power hitter status.
Schwarber has a career OPS of 1.137 at Fenway Park, ranking fifth all-time for players with at least 100 plate appearances.

title: Jayson Tatum reveals new goal he’s chasing with the Celtics
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Jayson Tatum aims to win another NBA championship and secure the Finals MVP with the Boston Celtics.
Tatum returned to play in March after an Achilles injury, but struggled with knee soreness in the playoffs.
Despite injuries, Tatum averaged 21.8 points, 10.0 rebounds, and 5.3 assists post-injury and is optimistic for next season.

title: 7 contracts Bruins might try to unload this offseason
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Boston Bruins consider moving Joonas Korpisalo's $3 million contract to increase cap space, possibly involving Michael DiPietro as backup.
Henri Jokiharju's $3 million and Mikey Eyssimont's $1.45 million contracts may be moved to clear roster space and salary cap.
Elias Lindholm's $7.75 million contract, hampered by injuries, complicates trade possibilities, posing a long-term cap issue for Boston.

title: First white shark sighting of 2026 confirmed off Massachusetts coast
author: Annie Jonas
bullets: The first white shark sighting of 2026 was confirmed off Massachusetts after a dead seal was found on Martha's Vineyard.
Andrew Jacobs and John Chisholm linked the seal's wounds to a white shark, marking the start of shark season.
Beachgoers are advised to avoid seal areas and use the Sharktivity app for reporting shark sightings and staying informed.

title: 10 stats to help contextualize the Red Sox’ rocky start
author: Trevor Hass
bullets: The Boston Red Sox have a 0-21 record when trailing after seven innings this season.
Red Sox hitters Trevor Story, Jarren Duran, and Caleb Durbin all have batting averages below .203.
Boston's defense leads MLB with 41 defensive runs saved, and they have six shutouts this season.

title: Want to own a piece of Dunkin’? Its parent company may go public.
author: Beth Treffeisen
bullets: Inspire Brands plans to take Dunkin' public for the third time in eight decades.
The IPO aims to repay $8.8 billion spent acquiring Dunkin' and $2.5 billion in assumed debt.
Inspire Brands filed confidentially for an IPO, with no set date or stock ticker yet announced.

title: Trooper who helped take down Memorial Drive gunman identified as victims’ families speak out
author: Abby Patkin
bullets: Trooper Landon Veney praised for heroism in Memorial Drive shooting, facing gunman Tyler Brown and returning fire.
Gunman Tyler Brown charged with armed assault; allegedly injured two men in chaotic Cambridge shooting.
One victim, a 62-year-old driver, injured in head but drove himself to hospital; another victim expected to survive.

title: A new grocery store is coming to the Seaport
author: Autumn Sloboda
bullets: Whole Foods Market is opening a Whole Foods Market Daily Shop at 111 Harbor Way in Boston's Seaport.
The store features a smaller format with curated selections, aiming for quicker shopping in urban areas.
Whole Foods plans to open additional Daily Shops in Chicago, Philadelphia, and expand in London and NYC.

title: Travelers can now get real-time security checkpoint wait times at Logan Airport
author: Kristi Palma
bullets: Logan Airport introduces real-time security wait time monitoring available on its website and the FlyLogan app.
Massport's new tool uses cameras that track line length and speed without recording personal details.
Logan Airport maintained its No. 10 ranking in the 2025 J.D. Power Satisfaction Study, showing improved scores.
